items.situation: responding to an invitation or suggestion
items.speaker: How am I supposed to get to your place?

options.A: Don't worry, I'll come pick you up.
options.B: My place is bigger than yours.
options.C: I got there really late last night.
options.D: Yes, you should definitely come along.

items.explanation: 说话人表面问"怎么去你家"，实际担心交通方式。正确答案A不直接回答方式，而是直接解决他的难题——主动开车去接，属于context_shift。B是语义关联陷阱：抓住"place"却去比较房子大小，答非所问。C是语义关联陷阱：复用"get there"但说的是昨晚到达，与当前安排无关。D是错误问题类型：回答的是"我该不该来"这种是非问，而非"怎么来"。

items.situation: student discussing a presentation topic with partner
items.speaker: Do you think our topic is too broad?

options.A: Yes, the room is pretty broad.
options.B: Actually, we could narrow it down.
options.D: I gave a great talk last semester.

items.explanation: 说话人问选题是否太宽泛。正确答案B以话语标记"Actually"开头，间接回应——承认问题并提出缩小范围，属于marker_led_indirect。A是语义关联陷阱兼一词多义：把"broad"（宽泛）误用为"宽敞"形容房间。C是离题选项：说的是展示时间，与选题宽窄无关。D是离题选项：谈论上学期自己的演讲，与当前选题无关。

items.situation: offering help to someone who seems stressed
items.speaker: You look like you've got a lot on your plate.

options.A: The plate is on the kitchen table.
options.B: I ordered way too much food.
options.C: Yeah, let me know if you can help out.

items.explanation: 说话人用习语"a lot on your plate"表示"事情很多/压力大"，是在表达关心。正确答案C顺势回应——承认并请求帮助，自然推进对话。A是语义关联陷阱兼一词多义：把"plate"字面理解为餐盘。B是语义关联陷阱：抓住"plate"联想到点餐过多，答非所问。D是离题选项：转去评论第三人"她"很累，没有回应对方的关心。

items.situation: friend sharing news or personal update
items.speaker: Why didn't you tell me you got the job?

options.A: The job is downtown near the station.
options.B: No, I haven't told her anything.
options.C: Tell me where you parked the car.
options.D: Honestly, I wanted to surprise you.

items.explanation: 说话人责怪式地问"为什么没告诉我你拿到工作了"，是在分享好消息后的互动。正确答案D以话语标记"Honestly"开头，间接说明原因——想给对方惊喜，属于marker_led_indirect。A是语义关联陷阱：抓住"job"去说工作地点，没回答"为什么"。B是错误问题类型：把问题当成是非问回答"没有"，且对象错成"她"。C是语义关联陷阱兼一词多义：复用"tell"但变成命令对方说停车位置。

items.situation: student checking lost-and-found at front desk
items.speaker: I think I left my backpack here yesterday.

options.C: I packed my bag this morning.

items.explanation: 学生在失物招领处说昨天落了背包。正确答案A以反问推进对话——询问颜色以便查找，属于counter_question。B是离题选项：说前台关门时间，没帮忙找包。C是语义关联陷阱：抓住"backpack/bag"去说自己今早收拾包，与失物无关。D是离题选项：附和"昨天很忙"，对找包毫无帮助。

items.situation: expressing concern about a friend's situation
items.speaker: What are you going to do about your rent?

options.A: The apartment is on the fifth floor.
options.B: I can lend you some money if you need.
options.C: Rent has gone up everywhere lately.
options.D: When did you sign the lease?

items.explanation: 说话人关切地问朋友"房租怎么办"，潜台词是担心对方付不起。正确答案B不直接答"怎么办"，而是主动提出借钱解决根本问题，属于context_shift。A是语义关联陷阱：抓住"rent"联想到公寓楼层，答非所问。C是语义关联陷阱兼离题：泛泛评论"房租到处都涨"，没回应对方的处境。D是错误问题类型：用反问"何时签约"转移话题，没解决当前困境。

items.situation: arranging a ride or carpool with a friend
items.speaker: Where should I wait for you tomorrow?

options.A: I waited for almost an hour.
options.B: Tomorrow is going to be sunny.
options.C: Right by the main entrance works.
options.D: Yes, I'll be driving the blue car.

items.explanation: 说话人安排拼车，问明天在哪等。正确答案C用口语化的"works"（这个地点可行）自然给出地点——主入口旁，属于idiomatic且直接推进。A是语义关联陷阱兼一词多义：复用"wait"但说的是过去等了一小时。B是离题选项：抓住"tomorrow"去说天气，没回答地点。D是错误问题类型：把"在哪"答成是非问，给出车的信息而非地点。

items.situation: student asking a professor about office hours or assignment
items.speaker: Are you free to meet sometime this week?

options.A: The meeting room is down the hall.
options.B: Yes, the assignment was due last week.
options.C: I felt free all summer long.
options.D: Well, my Thursday afternoon is open.

items.explanation: 学生问教授本周是否有空见面。正确答案D以话语标记"Well"开头，间接给出可行时段——周四下午有空，属于marker_led_indirect。A是语义关联陷阱：抓住"meet"联想到会议室位置，没回答是否有空。B是错误问题类型兼一词多义：复用"week"但答成作业截止时间，文不对题。C是语义关联陷阱兼一词多义：把"free"（有空）误用为"自由/无事"形容整个夏天。

items.situation: professor responding to a student question after lecture
items.speaker: Why is my thesis statement still too weak?

options.A: Have you tried making a clearer claim?
options.B: The thesis is due at the end of term.
options.C: I write all my statements by hand.
options.D: Yes, weak coffee keeps me up at night.

items.explanation: 学生课后问教授论文论点为何仍然不够有力。正确答案A以反问推进对话——引导学生提出更清晰的主张，属于counter_question。B是语义关联陷阱：抓住"thesis"去说截止日期，没解释为何薄弱。C是语义关联陷阱兼一词多义：复用"statement"但理解成"手写陈述"。D是语义关联陷阱兼一词多义：把"weak"（薄弱）误用为形容"淡咖啡"，完全离题。

items.situation: academic advisor reassuring a student about course load
items.speaker: I don't think I can handle five classes.

options.A: Let's drop one and lighten your schedule.
options.B: The classroom is on the second floor.
options.C: I handled the package very carefully.
options.D: Yes, five is a nice round number.

items.explanation: 学生向顾问坦言觉得五门课吃不消，潜台词是想减负。正确答案A不停留在表态，而是直接解决问题——退掉一门减轻负担，属于context_shift。B是语义关联陷阱：抓住"classes"联想到教室位置，答非所问。C是语义关联陷阱兼一词多义：复用"handle"但理解成"搬运包裹"。D是离题选项：附和"五是个好数字"，对学生的焦虑毫无帮助。

items.situation: librarian responding to a student returning a book
items.speaker: Is there a fine for returning this late?

options.A: The book was a really fine read.
options.B: Yes, the library closes at nine.
options.C: The shelves are fine just as they are.
options.D: Actually, we waived late fees this term.

items.explanation: 学生还书时问逾期是否有罚款。正确答案D以话语标记"Actually"开头，间接给出好消息——本学期免除逾期费，属于marker_led_indirect。A是一词多义陷阱：把"fine"（罚款）误用为"很好的"形容读物。B是错误问题类型：答成图书馆关门时间，没回答是否罚款。C是一词多义陷阱：再次把"fine"误用为"挺好"形容书架。

items.situation: coach checking in with a tired team member
items.speaker: You seem pretty worn out after practice.

options.A: Maybe sit out the next drill and rest.
options.B: My shoes are completely worn out.
options.D: Yes, the field was muddy today.

items.explanation: 教练观察到队员练完很疲惫，潜台词是关心其状态。正确答案A不停留在表态，而是直接解决问题——建议休息一轮，属于context_shift。B是语义关联陷阱兼一词多义：复用"worn out"但理解成"鞋子磨破了"。C是语义关联陷阱：抓住"practice"去说明天训练时间，没回应疲惫。D是离题选项：附和"场地很泥泞"，没回应队员的状态。

items.situation: resident assistant addressing a noise complaint with a student
items.speaker: Could you keep the music down after ten?

options.B: The music festival is next month.
options.C: I keep my room very tidy.

items.explanation: 宿管请学生十点后把音乐音量调小。正确答案A以反问推进协商——提议改用耳机，既配合又给出方案，属于counter_question。B是语义关联陷阱：抓住"music"去说音乐节，答非所问。C是语义关联陷阱兼一词多义：复用"keep"但变成"保持房间整洁"。D是错误问题类型兼一词多义：把"ten"（十点）误当成"十美元"来回答，文不对题。

items.situation: classmate asking about a missed study group
items.speaker: What did you guys cover in study group?

options.A: I can send you my notes tonight.
options.B: The cover of the book is torn.
options.C: Our group has about six people.
options.D: When does the group meet next?

items.explanation: 同学问"学习小组讲了什么"，潜台词是想补上错过的内容。正确答案A不逐条复述，而是直接解决需求——把笔记发过去，属于context_shift。B是一词多义陷阱：把"cover"（讲解）误用为"书的封面"。C是语义关联陷阱：抓住"group"去说人数，没回答讲了什么。D是错误问题类型：用反问"下次何时聚"转移话题，没回应当前问题。

items.situation: front desk staff helping a student with a room key
items.speaker: My key card stopped working this morning.

options.A: The morning shift starts at eight.
options.B: I worked really hard this morning.
options.C: Let me print you a new one right now.
options.D: She lost her keys last week too.

items.explanation: 学生在前台反映门卡今早失灵。正确答案C直接回应并解决——立刻补办一张新卡，自然推进对话。A是语义关联陷阱：抓住"morning"去说早班时间，没解决门卡问题。B是语义关联陷阱兼一词多义：复用"work/morning"但说成"今早工作很努力"。D是离题选项：转去说第三人"她"上周也丢钥匙，没帮当前学生。

items.situation: advisor discussing an internship application with a student
items.speaker: Did you submit the internship application yet?

options.A: The intern sits at that front desk.
options.B: Yes, applications make great wall art.
options.C: I submitted to the urge for a nap.
options.D: Not quite, I'm still polishing my resume.

items.explanation: 顾问问学生实习申请是否已提交。正确答案D以"Not quite"婉转作答，间接说明进度——还在完善简历，属于marker_led_indirect。A是语义关联陷阱：抓住"internship"去说实习生坐在哪，没回答是否提交。B是离题选项：把"applications"扯成"墙面装饰"，荒诞离题。C是一词多义陷阱：把"submit"（提交）误用为"屈服于（睡意）"，文不对题。
